stories.headline: Music Critic Anthony Fantano Breaks Silence Over Halsey Tweets: ‘I’m Not the Devil Himself’ - Variety
stories.summary: “The Needle Drop” YouTuber/music critic has found himself in the crosshairs of pop singer Halsey over an old album review.

stories.headline: ‘Hot Ones’ Spinoff ‘Extra Heat’ Fires Up at Netflix - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Sean Evans will host a series of specials tied to live events on the streamer, with the first installment coming after baseball's Home Run Derby.

stories.headline: Tag team breaks up on WWE Raw - F4W/WON
stories.summary: After once again failing to win the WWE Women’s Tag Team titles, Lyra Valkyria & Bayley are no longer tag team partners.

stories.headline: Google DeepMind bets $75M on AI’s future in Hollywood with A24 deal - TechCrunch
stories.summary: Google DeepMind and A24 are teaming up to build AI filmmaking tools.

stories.headline: Exclusive | Famed comedian Carlos Mencia whines from behind bars after ‘absurd show of force’ by new LA crime unit - New York Post
stories.summary: A formal arraignment and bail hearing are expected Monday at the Van Nuys courthouse.

stories.headline: Scary Mommy Founder Jill Smokler Dies of Brain Cancer at 48 - TODAY.com
stories.summary: Jill Smokler shared a raw and honest version of motherhood though her writing and website “Scary Mommy.” She died on June 22, 2026.

stories.headline: Tyrese Haliburton And Fiancée's Late Friend Makenzi Kern's Funeral Services Revealed - TMZ
stories.summary: Funeral services have been set for Makenzi Kern, whose tragic death at Tyrese Haliburton's fiancée, Jade Jones' bachelorette, shocked loved ones.

stories.headline: Country star Bailey Zimmerman facing felony charges for allegedly trashing hotel room, causing thousands in damages - Page Six
stories.summary: The musician was hit with several charges for an alleged incident in New Mexico back in May.
